name: GridColumnResizeApi
description: The Resize API interface that is available in the grid `apiRef`.

properties.name: autosizeColumns
properties.description: Auto-size the columns of the grid based on the cells' content and the space available.
properties.type: (options?: { columns?: string[], includeHeaders?: boolean, includeHeaderFilters?: boolean, includeOutliers?: boolean, outliersFactor?: number, expand?: boolean, disableColumnVirtualization?: boolean }) => Promise<void>
